q: How do I redeem codes in Heartopia?
a: Open the Settings menu → tap 'Gift Code' → enter the code exactly as shown → tap 'Confirm' to receive your rewards. Codes are case-sensitive, so copy them exactly as listed.

q: How do I unlock my home plot?
a: Progress through the main story quests given by Mayor Atara at Town Hall. The home plot unlocks after completing the introductory quest chain, typically around D.G. Level 3-5.

Yes! Heartopia is completely free to play. There are optional in-app purchases for cosmetics and convenience items, but all core gameplay, story content, and events are accessible without spending money.

q: What platforms can I play Heartopia on?
a: Heartopia is available on iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play), and PC via Steam. The game supports cross-platform play, so you can play with friends regardless of which platform they're on.

q: How do I add and play with friends?
a: Open the Social menu from the main screen → tap 'Add Friend' → search by player ID or username → send a friend request. Once accepted, you can visit each other's homes, attend parties, and trade items. Heartopia supports up to 8-player multiplayer.

q: How often do in-game events occur?
a: Heartopia typically runs seasonal events, monthly competitions, and weekly welfare events. Check the Events page regularly or follow the official social media accounts for announcements.

q: How many hobbies are there and which should I start with?
a: There are 7 core hobbies: Fishing, Gardening, Birdwatching, Cooking, Bug Catching, Cat Raising, and Dog Raising. Start with Fishing (taught by Vanya at the River Pier at Level 1) — it's the quickest way to earn early-game gold.
Heartopia requires an internet connection to play. This ensures your progress is saved to the cloud and enables multiplayer features, real-time events, and cross-platform synchronization.
